ban.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.
ban.higher_role: I cannot ban {name} — their role is equal to or higher than mine.

unban.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the ban list.

kick.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.
kick.higher_role: I cannot kick {name} — their role is equal to or higher than mine.

mute.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.
mute.higher_role: I cannot mute {name} — their role is equal to or higher than mine.

unmute.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.

move.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.
move.success: {name} was moved to position {position} in the queue.

swap.not_found: User not found in the room.
swap.not_in_queue: Both users must be in the queue.
swap.same_position: These users are already in the same position.

remove.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.
remove.self: I cannot remove myself from the queue.
remove.not_in_queue: User "{target}" is not in the queue.

maxlength.success: Max song duration updated to {value} min.

blacklist.no_track: No track playing to show info.
blacklist.already_listed: This track is already on the blacklist.
blacklist.added_skip_failed: Track added to blacklist, but couldn't skip: {error}
blacklist.invalid_action: Invalid action. Use add, remove, list or info.

woot.no_track: No track playing to vote on.

settings.invalid_key: Invalid key. Use !settings list to see available keys.

queue.not_in_queue: The bot is not in the queue right now.
queue.position: 🎧 Bot is at position {position}/{total} in the queue

stats.not_connected: Bot is not fully connected yet.

dc.not_found: User "{target}" not found in the room.
dc.no_permission: No permission to use !dc on another user.
dc.no_snapshot: No queue record found for this user.
dc.expired: Time limit exceeded to restore position.
dc.not_in_queue: You need to join the queue before restoring your position with !dc.
dc.error: Error restoring position: {error}. If needed, join the queue and use !dc again.

cookie.not_found: Could not find "{target}" in the room.
self_lines: Cookie delivered to @{sender}. Careful, it's hot.
A cookie fell from the sky for @{sender}.
@{sender} found a cookie in their pocket.
@{sender} opened the box and found a golden cookie.
@{sender} was rewarded with an extra soft cookie.
gift_lines: @{sender} gave a cookie to @{target}. Fresh out of the oven.
@{sender} tossed a cookie to @{target}. Caught it in midair.
@{sender} delivered an extra crunchy cookie to @{target}.

thor.no_permission: I don't have permission to move/remove from the queue.
thor.not_in_queue: You need to be in the queue to use !thor.
good_lines: Thor smiled upon {name}. You move to the top of the queue.
The hammer approved {name}. Going to position 1.
neutral_lines: Thor watched in silence. Nothing happened.
bad_lines: Thor got angry. {name} left the queue.
Lightning! {name} lost their spot in the queue.
The hammer spoke. {name} was removed from the queue.

roulette.already_open: Russian roulette is already open. Use !join to enter.
roulette.opened: Russian roulette is open! Use !join to risk it ({seconds}s).
roulette.not_in_queue: You need to be in the queue to participate.
roulette.already_joined: You are already in the russian roulette.
roulette.not_joined: You are not in the russian roulette.

registry.no_permission_bot: I don't have permission to run !{cmd} — I need to be {role} or higher.
registry.no_permission_user: @{user} You need to be {role} or higher to use !{cmd}.
